widgets.title: Revenue by Month and Region
queries: SELECT "MONTH" AS category, SUM(REVENUE) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY "MONTH" ORDER BY MIN(ID)
SELECT REGION AS category, SUM(REVENUE) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY REGION ORDER BY SUM(REVENUE) DESC

widgets.title: Employees Overview
queries: SELECT NAME AS "Employee Name", DEPARTMENT AS "Department", AGE AS "Age", SALARY AS "Salary" FROM EMPLOYEES ORDER BY SALARY DESC

widgets.title: Product Pricing and Sales
queries: SELECT PRODUCT_NAME AS "Product", CATEGORY AS "Category", PRICE AS "Price", UNITS_SOLD AS "Units Sold" FROM PRODUCTS ORDER BY UNITS_SOLD DESC

widgets.title: Units Sold by Product Category
queries: SELECT CATEGORY AS category, SUM(UNITS_SOLD) AS total_units FROM PRODUCTS GROUP BY CATEGORY ORDER BY SUM(UNITS_SOLD) DESC

widgets.title: Average Salary by Department
queries: SELECT DEPARTMENT AS category, AVG(SALARY) AS avg_salary FROM EMPLOYEES GROUP BY DEPARTMENT ORDER BY AVG(SALARY) DESC
